data.name: xr_proc_facturas_mes
data.value: Select FAC.fac_fac_nu AS 'fac_numfac' ,FAC.fecha AS 'fac_fecha' ,CLI.cli_nom AS 'cli_nombre' ,CLI.cli_pais AS 'cli_pais' ,CLI.cli_ciudad AS 'cli_ciudad' ,CAST(SUM(IIF(REM.rem_codig <> '05TRAM01', REM.rem_canti, 0)) AS NUMERIC(10,2)) AS 'rem_cant' ,CAST(SUM(IIF(REM.rem_codig <> '05TRAM01', REM.rem_precio, 0)) AS NUMERIC(10,2)) AS 'rem_precio' ,CAST(SUM(IIF(REM.rem_codig <> '05TRAM01', REM.rem_canti * REM.rem_precio, 0)) AS NUMERIC(10,2)) AS 'rem_cantprecio' ,CAST(SUM(IIF(REM.rem_codig <> '05TRAM01', REM.rem_descue, 0)) AS NUMERIC(10,2)) * -1 AS 'rem_descuen' ,CAST(SUM(IIF(REM.rem_codig = '05TRAM01', REM.rem_canti * REM.rem_precio, 0)) AS NUMERIC(10,2)) AS 'rem_tramit' ,NVL(PAG.pg_amo_dol, 0) AS 'pag_amount' ,NVL(PAG.pg_recnum, '') AS 'pag_numroc' ,NVL(PAG.pg_fecpag, CTOD('')) AS 'pag_fecha' ,FAC.fac_amo_do as 'fac_total' ,IIF(CLI.cli_regime='', NVL(TAR.nom_regime, ''), CLI.cli_regime) AS 'tipo_regimen' from FACTURA AS FAC INNER JOIN CLIENTE AS CLI ON FAC.CLI_CODIG = CLI.CLI_COD INNER JOIN .\TempRemision\REMISION AS REM ON (FAC.ord_numero = REM.rem_numero AND MONTH(FAC.fecha) = MONTH(REM.rem_fecha)) LEFT JOIN TARIFA AS TAR ON (CLI.tip_regime = TAR.tip_regime) AND ((CLI.can_metraj >= TAR.desde AND CLI.can_metraj <= TAR.hasta AND CLI.can_metraj > 0) OR (CLI.callc_esta >= TAR.desde AND CLI.callc_esta <= TAR.hasta AND CLI.callc_esta > 0)) LEFT JOIN PAGOS AS PAG ON (FAC.fac_fac_nu = PAG.pg_factura) {2} group by fac_numfac, fac_fecha, cli_nombre, cli_pais, cli_ciudad, pag_amount, pag_numroc, pag_fecha, fac_total, tipo_regimen order by fac_numfac HAVING FAC.fac_amo_do > 0 where YEAR(FAC.fecha) = {0} AND MONTH(FAC.fecha) = {1}
data.comment: Procedimiento para reporte de Listado de Empresas Facturadas en un Año y Mes especificado (este reporte ademas contiene información acerca del pago a esta factura: ROC)

data.name: xr_proc_metraje_anual
data.value: Select CLI.cli_cod AS 'cli_cod' ,CLI.cli_nom AS 'cli_nombre' ,MONTH(FAC.fecha) AS 'fac_mesfact' ,SUM(NVL(REM.rem_canti, 0)) AS 'rem_cant' from CLIENTE AS CLI INNER JOIN FACTURA AS FAC ON CLI.CLI_COD = FAC.CLI_CODIG LEFT JOIN .\TempRemision\REMISION AS REM ON (FAC.ord_numero = REM.rem_numero AND REM.rem_codig not like '%TRAM%' AND MONTH(FAC.fecha) = MONTH(REM.rem_fecha)) group by cli_cod, cli_nombre, fac_mesfact order by CLI.cli_nom HAVING rem_cant > 0 where YEAR(FAC.fecha) = {0}
data.comment: Procedimiento para reporte de Metraje Anual por empresas

data.name: xr_proc_facturas_compara_mes_act_ant
data.value: Select CLI.cli_cod AS 'cli_cod' ,CLI.cli_nom AS 'cli_nombre' ,CAST(SUM(IIF(REM.rem_codig <> '05TRAM01', REM.rem_canti, 0)) AS NUMERIC(10,2)) AS 'rem_cant' ,CAST(SUM(IIF(REM.rem_codig <> '05TRAM01', REM.rem_canti * REM.rem_precio, 0)) AS NUMERIC(10,2)) AS 'rem_cantprecio' ,CAST(SUM(IIF(REM.rem_codig <> '05TRAM01', REM.rem_descue, 0)) AS NUMERIC(10,2)) * -1 AS 'rem_descuen' ,CAST(SUM(IIF(REM.rem_codig = '05TRAM01', REM.rem_canti * REM.rem_precio, 0)) AS NUMERIC(10,2)) AS 'rem_tramit' ,FAC.fac_amo_do as 'fac_total' ,MONTH(FAC.fecha) AS 'fac_mesfact' ,YEAR(FAC.fecha) AS 'fac_yearfact' from FACTURA AS FAC INNER JOIN CLIENTE AS CLI ON FAC.CLI_CODIG = CLI.CLI_COD INNER JOIN .\TempRemision\REMISION AS REM ON (FAC.ord_numero = REM.rem_numero AND MONTH(FAC.fecha) = MONTH(REM.rem_fecha)) group by cli_cod, cli_nombre, fac_total, fac_mesfact, fac_yearfact order by cli_nombre HAVING FAC.fac_amo_do > 0 where (YEAR(FAC.fecha) = {0} AND MONTH(FAC.fecha) = {1}) OR (YEAR(FAC.fecha) = {2} AND MONTH(FAC.fecha) = {3})
data.comment: Reporte comparativo de Facturas Mes Actual (del filtro seleccionado) VS Mes Anterior (al filtro seleccionado): {0}: Año Actual {1}: Mes Actual {2}: Año Anterior {3}: Mes Anterior

data.name: xr_proc_antiguedad_saldo_est_cuenta
data.value: SELECT FAC.fac_fac_nu AS 'fac_numfac' ,FAC.fecha AS 'fac_fecha' ,CLI.cli_cod AS 'cli_cod' ,CLI.cli_nom AS 'cli_nombre' ,UPPER(CLI.cli_regime) AS 'tipo_reg' ,FAC.fac_amo_do as 'factotd' ,NVL(PAG.pg_recnum, '') AS 'pag_numroc' ,NVL(PAG.pg_fecpag, CTOD('')) AS 'pag_fecha' ,NVL(PAG.pg_amo_dol, 0) AS 'pag_totd' ,CAST((FAC.fac_amo_do - NVL(PAG.pg_amo_dol, 0)) AS NUMERIC(12,2)) as 'sdo_totd' ,CAST(((FAC.fac_amo_do - NVL(PAG.pg_amo_dol, 0)) * {2}) AS NUMERIC(12,2)) as 'sdo_totccalc' ,CAST(IIF((({1} - FAC.fecha) / {2}) <= 1, (FAC.fac_amo_do - NVL(PAG.pg_amo_dol, 0)), 0) AS NUMERIC(12,2)) AS 'sdo_30' ,CAST(IIF(((({1} - FAC.fecha) / {2}) > 1) AND ((({1} - FAC.fecha) / {2}) <= 2), (FAC.fac_amo_do - NVL(PAG.pg_amo_dol, 0)), 0) AS NUMERIC(10,2)) AS 'sdo_60' ,CAST(IIF(((({1} - FAC.fecha) / {2}) > 2) AND ((({1} - FAC.fecha) / {2}) <= 3), (FAC.fac_amo_do - NVL(PAG.pg_amo_dol, 0)), 0) AS NUMERIC(10,2)) AS 'sdo_90' ,CAST(IIF((({1} - FAC.fecha) / {2}) > 3, (FAC.fac_amo_do - NVL(PAG.pg_amo_dol, 0)), 0) AS NUMERIC(12,2)) AS 'sdo_mas90' ,NVL(( SELECT (SUM(FAC2.fac_amo_do) - SUM(NVL((SELECT SUM(PAG2.pg_amo_dol) from PAGOS as PAG2 where PAG2.pg_factura=FAC2.fac_fac_nu), 0))) FROM FACTURA AS FAC2 INNER JOIN CLIENTE AS CLI2 ON FAC2.CLI_CODIG = CLI2.CLI_COD where FAC2.fecha < {0} AND FAC2.CLI_CODIG = FAC.cli_codig AND FAC2.fac_amo_do > 0 AND FAC2.fac_fac_nu > 100 AND FAC2.tipo = '1' ), 0) AS 'sdo_antd' FROM CLIENTE AS CLI LEFT JOIN FACTURA AS FAC ON FAC.CLI_CODIG = CLI.CLI_COD LEFT JOIN PAGOS AS PAG ON (FAC.fac_fac_nu = PAG.pg_factura) WHERE FAC.fac_amo_do > 0 AND FAC.tipo == '1' AND FAC.fac_fac_nu > 100 AND (FAC.fecha >= {0} AND FAC.fecha <= {1}) AND (FAC.cli_codig NOT LIKE '04%') {3} ORDER BY FAC.fecha, FAC.fac_fac_nu, PAG.pg_recnum
data.comment: Query para reporte de Antiguedad de Saldos y Estado de Cuenta de Cliente: Parámetros: {0}: Fecha Inicial {1}: Fecha Final {2}: Tasa de Fecha Final {3}: Filtra por un Cliente

data.name: xr_proc_clisdo_ANT
data.value:
SELECT CLI.cli_cod, CLI.cli_nom, CLI.cli_regime as 'tipo_regim', SUM(FAC.fac_amo_do) as 'fac_totd', SUM(NVL((SELECT SUM(PAG.pg_amo_dol) from PAGOS as PAG where PAG.pg_factura=FAC.fac_fac_nu), 0)) as 'pag_totd' FROM FACTURA AS FAC INNER JOIN CLIENTE AS CLI ON FAC.CLI_CODIG = CLI.CLI_COD where FAC.fecha < {0} {1} AND FAC.fac_amo_do > 0 AND FAC.fac_fac_nu > 100 AND FAC.tipo = '1'
GROUP BY CLI.cli_cod, CLI.cli_nom, CLI.cli_regime
data.comment:
Query para obtener el saldo anterior de los clientes a partir de una fecha especificada:
Parámetros: {0}: Fecha Inicial {1}: Código Cliente
